title: Falcon's Wither Storm Adventure: Core
description: Addon for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod and Create. Serves as a core for the modpack "Falcon's Wither Storm Adventure".
body:
# 🛰️ Features:

This mod serves as the core of the modpack [Falcon's Wither Storm Adventure](https://modrinth.com/modpack/iy9p8OiL). The features are roughly explained below:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### 🛰️ Mod:
- Lives Counter (Counts from 10 down to 0 every death. If all hearts are depleted, you switch into spectator mode)
### ⚙️ Create:
- Craftable Command Block
  - Custom Items & Recipes
  - Recipe Hints
### 🌌 Wither Storm Mod:
- [No Rundown House](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/no-rundown-house) (Disables the default starter house of the mod, since you are able to craft the command block anyways)

</details>

## 🔧 Dependencies
- [🌌 Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/kWjNGDUH)
- [⚙️ Create](https://modrinth.com/project/LNytGWDc)
